title: Why Do Heathen Nations Rage?

verses.text: He who sits in heaven laughs; God derides and mocks them all. Then to them he speaks in wrath, fear and dread on them do fall: “Yet according to my will, I have set my king to reign; fixed on Zion’s holy hill, my Anointed will remain”

I will tell of his decree: this to me the LORD did say, “You are my beloved Son, I have brought you forth this day. Ask for all the earth abroad; you shall own the nations far. You will break them with a rod, dash them like a potter’s jar.”

Therefore kings, be wise, be warned; rulers of the earth, give ear. Come with awe and serve the LORD; mingle joy with trembling fear. Kiss the Son, his anger turn, lest you perish in the way, for his wrath will quickly burn. All who trust him – blest are they!
